text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والجبال اوتادا

text_english: and created you in pairs
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَخَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ أَزْوَٰجًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وخلقناكم ازواجا

text_english: and made your sleep for rest
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَجَعَلْنَا نَوْمَكُمْ سُبَاتًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وجعلنا نومكم سباتا

text_english: and made the night as a cover
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِبَاسًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وجعلنا الليل لباسا

text_english: and made the day for livelihood
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلنَّهَارَ مَعَاشًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وجعلنا النهار معاشا

text_english: and built above you seven mighty ˹heavens˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَبَنَيْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعًا شِدَادًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وبنينا فوقكم سبعا شدادا

text_english: and placed ˹in them˺ a shining lamp
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَجَعَلْنَا سِرَاجًا وَهَّاجًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وجعلنا سراجا وهاجا

text_english: and sent down from rainclouds pouring water
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمُعْصِرَٰتِ مَآءً ثَجَّاجًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وانزلنا من المعصرات ماء ثجاجا

text_english: producing by it grain and ˹various˺ plants
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لِّنُخْرِجَ بِهِۦ حَبًّا وَنَبَاتًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لنخرج به حبا ونباتا

text_english: and dense orchards?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَجَنَّـٰتٍ أَلْفَافًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وجنات الفافا

text_english: Indeed, the Day of ˹Final˺ Decision is an appointed time—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ كَانَ مِيقَـٰتًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان يوم الفصل كان ميقاتا

text_english: ˹it is˺ the Day the Trumpet will be blown, and you will ˹all˺ come forth in crowds.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يوم ينفخ في الصور فتاتون افواجا

text_english: The sky will be ˹split˺ open, becoming ˹many˺ gates
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَفُتِحَتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ أَبْوَٰبًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وفتحت السماء فكانت ابوابا

text_english: and the mountains will be blown away, becoming ˹like˺ a mirage.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَسُيِّرَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ فَكَانَتْ سَرَابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وسيرت الجبال فكانت سرابا

text_english: Indeed, Hell is lying in ambush
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتْ مِرْصَادًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان جهنم كانت مرصادا

text_english: as a home for the transgressors
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لِّلطَّـٰغِينَ مَـَٔابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: للطاغين مابا

text_english: where they will remain for ˹endless˺ ages.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَّـٰبِثِينَ فِيهَآ أَحْقَابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لابثين فيها احقابا

text_english: There they will not taste any coolness or drink
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًا وَلَا شَرَابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لا يذوقون فيها بردا ولا شرابا

text_english: except boiling water and ˹oozing˺ pus—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِلَّا حَمِيمًا وَغَسَّاقًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الا حميما وغساقا

text_english: a fitting reward.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: جَزَآءً وِفَاقًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: جزاء وفاقا

text_english: For they never expected any reckoning
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَرْجُونَ حِسَابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انهم كانوا لا يرجون حسابا

text_english: and totally rejected Our signs.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كِذَّابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وكذبوا باياتنا كذابا

text_english: And We have everything recorded precisely.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَـٰهُ كِتَـٰبًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وكل شيء احصيناه كتابا

text_english: ˹So the deniers will be told,˺ “Taste ˹the punishment˺, for all you will get from Us is more torment.”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَذُوقُوا۟ فَلَن نَّزِيدَكُمْ إِلَّا عَذَابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فذوقوا فلن نزيدكم الا عذابا

text_english: Indeed, the righteous will have salvation—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ مَفَازًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان للمتقين مفازا

text_english: Gardens, vineyards
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: حَدَآئِقَ وَأَعْنَـٰبًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: حدائق واعنابا

text_english: and full-bosomed maidens of equal age
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَكَوَاعِبَ أَتْرَابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وكواعب اترابا

text_english: and full cups ˹of pure wine˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَكَأْسًا دِهَاقًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وكاسا دهاقا

text_english: never to hear any idle talk or lying therein—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا كِذَّٰبًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لا يسمعون فيها لغوا ولا كذابا

text_english: a ˹fitting˺ reward as a generous gift from your Lord
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: جَزَآءً مِّن رَّبِّكَ عَطَآءً حِسَابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: جزاء من ربك عطاء حسابا

text_english: the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything in between, the Most Compassionate. No one will dare speak to Him
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: رب السماوات والارض وما بينهما الرحمن لا يملكون منه خطابا

text_english: on the Day the ˹holy˺ spirit and the angels will stand in ranks. None will talk, except those granted permission by the Most Compassionate and whose words are true.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يوم يقوم الروح والملائكة صفا لا يتكلمون الا من اذن له الرحمن وقال صوابا

text_english: That Day is the ˹ultimate˺ truth. So let whoever wills take the path leading back to their Lord.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ذلك اليوم الحق فمن شاء اتخذ الى ربه مابا

text_english: Indeed, We have warned you of an imminent punishment—the Day every person will see ˹the consequences of˺ what their hands have done, and the disbelievers will cry, “I wish I were dust.”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّآ أَنذَرْنَـٰكُمْ عَذَابًا قَرِيبًا يَوْمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلْمَرْءُ مَا قَدَّمَتْ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلْكَافِرُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى كُنتُ تُرَٰبًۢا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انا انذرناكم عذابا قريبا يوم ينظر المرء ما قدمت يداه ويقول الكافر يا ليتني كنت ترابا

text_english: By those ˹angels˺ stripping out ˹evil souls˺ harshly
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلنَّـٰزِعَـٰتِ غَرْقًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والنازعات غرقا

text_english: and those pulling out ˹good souls˺ gently
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلنَّـٰشِطَـٰتِ نَشْطًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والناشطات نشطا

text_english: and those gliding ˹through heavens˺ swiftly
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلسَّـٰبِحَـٰتِ سَبْحًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والسابحات سبحا

text_english: and those taking the lead vigorously
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَٱلسَّـٰبِقَـٰتِ سَبْقًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فالسابقات سبقا

text_english: and those conducting affairs ˹obediently˺!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَٱلْمُدَبِّرَٰتِ أَمْرًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فالمدبرات امرا

text_english: ˹Consider˺ the Day ˹when˺ the quaking Blast will come to pass
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلرَّاجِفَةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يوم ترجف الراجفة

text_english: followed by a second Blast.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: تَتْبَعُهَا ٱلرَّادِفَةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: تتبعها الرادفة

text_english: ˹The deniers’˺ hearts on that Day will be trembling ˹in horror˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: قُلُوبٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاجِفَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: قلوب يومئذ واجفة

text_english: with their eyes downcast.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَبْصَـٰرُهَا خَـٰشِعَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ابصارها خاشعة

text_english: ˹But now˺ they ask ˹mockingly˺, “Will we really be restored to our former state
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَقُولُونَ أَءِنَّا لَمَرْدُودُونَ فِى ٱلْحَافِرَةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يقولون اانا لمردودون في الحافرة

text_english: even after we have been reduced to decayed bones?”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَـٰمًا نَّخِرَةً
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ااذا كنا عظاما نخرة

text_english: Adding, “Then such a return would be a ˹total˺ loss ˹for us˺!”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: قَالُوا۟ تِلْكَ إِذًا كَرَّةٌ خَاسِرَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: قالوا تلك اذا كرة خاسرة

text_english: But indeed, it will take only one ˹mighty˺ Blast
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فانما هي زجرة واحدة

text_english: and at once they will be above ground.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَإِذَا هُم بِٱلسَّاهِرَةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاذا هم بالساهرة

text_english: Has the story of Moses reached you ˹O Prophet˺?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: هل اتاك حديث موسى

text_english: His Lord called him in the sacred valley of Ṭuwa
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِذْ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اذ ناداه ربه بالواد المقدس طوى

text_english: ˹commanding,˺ “Go to Pharaoh, for he has truly transgressed ˹all bounds˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱذْهَبْ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اذهب الى فرعون انه طغى

text_english: And say, ‘Would you ˹be willing to˺ purify yourself
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَقُلْ هَل لَّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَن تَزَكَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فقل هل لك الى ان تزكى

text_english: and let me guide you to your Lord so that you will be in awe ˹of Him˺?’”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَهْدِيَكَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَتَخْشَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واهديك الى ربك فتخشى

text_english: Then Moses showed him the great sign
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَرَىٰهُ ٱلْـَٔايَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاراه الاية الكبرى

text_english: but he denied and disobeyed ˹Allah˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَكَذَّبَ وَعَصَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فكذب وعصى

text_english: then turned his back, striving ˹against the truth˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ يَسْعَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم ادبر يسعى

text_english: Then he summoned ˹his people˺ and called out
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَحَشَرَ فَنَادَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فحشر فنادى

text_english: saying, “I am your lord, the most high!”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَقَالَ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فقال انا ربكم الاعلى

text_english: So Allah overtook him, making him an example in this life and the next.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَخَذَهُ ٱللَّهُ نَكَالَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ وَٱلْأُولَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاخذه الله نكال الاخرة والاولى

text_english: Surely in this is a lesson for whoever stands in awe of ˹Allah˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان في ذلك لعبرة لمن يخشى

text_english: Which is harder to create: you or the sky? He built it
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ ۚ بَنَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اانتم اشد خلقا ام السماء بناها

text_english: raising it high and forming it flawlessly.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: رَفَعَ سَمْكَهَا فَسَوَّىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: رفع سمكها فسواها

text_english: He dimmed its night, and brought forth its daylight.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَغْطَشَ لَيْلَهَا وَأَخْرَجَ ضُحَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واغطش ليلها واخرج ضحاها

text_english: As for the earth, He spread it out as well
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ دَحَىٰهَآ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والارض بعد ذلك دحاها

text_english: bringing forth its water and pastures
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَخْرَجَ مِنْهَا مَآءَهَا وَمَرْعَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اخرج منها ماءها ومرعاها

text_english: and setting the mountains firmly ˹upon it˺—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلْجِبَالَ أَرْسَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والجبال ارساها

text_english: all as ˹a means of˺ sustenance for you and your animals.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مَتَـٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَـٰمِكُمْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: متاعا لكم ولانعامكم

text_english: But, when the Supreme Disaster comes to pass—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلطَّآمَّةُ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاذا جاءت الطامة الكبرى

text_english: the Day every person will remember all ˹their˺ striving
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَوْمَ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا سَعَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يوم يتذكر الانسان ما سعى

text_english: and the Hellfire will be displayed for all to see—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِمَن يَرَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وبرزت الجحيم لمن يرى

text_english: then as for those who transgressed
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَمَّا مَن طَغَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاما من طغى

text_english: and preferred the ˹fleeting˺ life of this world
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَءَاثَرَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واثر الحياة الدنيا

text_english: the Hellfire will certainly be ˹their˺ home.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فان الجحيم هي الماوى

text_english: And as for those who were in awe of standing before their Lord and restrained themselves from ˹evil˺ desires
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ وَنَهَى ٱلنَّفْسَ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واما من خاف مقام ربه ونهى النفس عن الهوى

text_english: Paradise will certainly be ˹their˺ home.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَنَّةَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فان الجنة هي الماوى

text_english: They ask you ˹O Prophet˺ regarding the Hour, “When will it be?”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ أَيَّانَ مُرْسَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يسالونك عن الساعة ايان مرساها

text_english: But it is not for you to tell its time.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فِيمَ أَنتَ مِن ذِكْرَىٰهَآ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فيم انت من ذكراها

text_english: That knowledge rests with your Lord ˹alone˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ مُنتَهَىٰهَآ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الى ربك منتهاها

text_english: Your duty is only to warn whoever is in awe of it.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُنذِرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انما انت منذر من يخشاها

text_english: On the Day they see it, it will be as if they had stayed ˹in the world˺ no more than one evening or its morning.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَأَنَّهُمْ يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَهَا لَمْ يَلْبَثُوٓا۟ إِلَّا عَشِيَّةً أَوْ ضُحَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كانهم يوم يرونها لم يلبثوا الا عشية او ضحاها

text_english: He frowned and turned ˹his attention˺ away
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: عَبَسَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: عبس وتولى

text_english: ˹simply˺ because the blind man came to him ˹interrupting˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَن جَآءَهُ ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان جاءه الاعمى

text_english: You never know ˹O Prophet˺, perhaps he may be purified
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا يُدْرِيكَ لَعَلَّهُۥ يَزَّكَّىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما يدريك لعله يزكى

text_english: or he may be mindful, benefitting from the reminder.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَوْ يَذَّكَّرُ فَتَنفَعَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: او يذكر فتنفعه الذكرى

text_english: As for the one who was indifferent
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَمَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اما من استغنى

text_english: you gave him your ˹undivided˺ attention
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَنتَ لَهُۥ تَصَدَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فانت له تصدى

text_english: even though you are not to blame if he would not be purified.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا عَلَيْكَ أَلَّا يَزَّكَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما عليك الا يزكى

text_english: But as for the one who came to you, eager ˹to learn˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَمَّا مَن جَآءَكَ يَسْعَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واما من جاءك يسعى

text_english: being in awe ˹of Allah˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَهُوَ يَخْشَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وهو يخشى

text_english: you were inattentive to him.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَنتَ عَنْهُ تَلَهَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فانت عنه تلهى

text_english: But no! This ˹revelation˺ is truly a reminder.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّآ إِنَّهَا تَذْكِرَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا انها تذكرة

text_english: So let whoever wills be mindful of it.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فمن شاء ذكره

text_english: It is ˹written˺ on pages held in honour—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فِى صُحُفٍ مُّكَرَّمَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: في صحف مكرمة

text_english: highly esteemed, purified—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مَّرْفُوعَةٍ مُّطَهَّرَةٍۭ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: مرفوعة مطهرة

text_english: by the hands of angel-scribes
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: بِأَيْدِى سَفَرَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: بايدي سفرة

text_english: honourable and virtuous.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كِرَامٍۭ بَرَرَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كرام بررة

text_english: Condemned are ˹disbelieving˺ humans! How ungrateful they are ˹to Allah˺!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: قُتِلَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَآ أَكْفَرَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: قتل الانسان ما اكفره

text_english: From what substance did He create them?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مِنْ أَىِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: من اي شيء خلقه

text_english: He created them from a sperm-drop, and ordained their development.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ خَلَقَهُۥ فَقَدَّرَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: من نطفة خلقه فقدره

text_english: Then He makes the way easy for them
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ ٱلسَّبِيلَ يَسَّرَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم السبيل يسره

text_english: then causes them to die and be buried.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ أَمَاتَهُۥ فَأَقْبَرَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم اماته فاقبره

text_english: Then when He wills, He will resurrect them.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ إِذَا شَآءَ أَنشَرَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم اذا شاء انشره

text_english: But no! They have failed to comply with what He ordered.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّا لَمَّا يَقْضِ مَآ أَمَرَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا لما يقض ما امره

text_english: Let people then consider their food:
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِلَىٰ طَعَامِهِۦٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فلينظر الانسان الى طعامه

text_english: how We pour down rain in abundance
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَنَّا صَبَبْنَا ٱلْمَآءَ صَبًّا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انا صببنا الماء صبا

text_english: and meticulously split the earth open ˹for sprouts˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ شَقَقْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ شَقًّا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم شققنا الارض شقا

text_english: causing grain to grow in it
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا حَبًّا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فانبتنا فيها حبا

text_english: as well as grapes and greens
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَعِنَبًا وَقَضْبًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وعنبا وقضبا

text_english: and olives and palm trees
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَزَيْتُونًا وَنَخْلًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وزيتونا ونخلا

text_english: and dense orchards
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَحَدَآئِقَ غُلْبًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وحدائق غلبا

text_english: and fruit and fodder—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَفَـٰكِهَةً وَأَبًّا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وفاكهة وابا

text_english: all as ˹a means of˺ sustenance for you and your animals.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مَّتَـٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَـٰمِكُمْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: متاعا لكم ولانعامكم

text_english: Then, when the Deafening Blast comes to pass—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلصَّآخَّةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاذا جاءت الصاخة

text_english: on that Day every person will flee from their own siblings
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَوْمَ يَفِرُّ ٱلْمَرْءُ مِنْ أَخِيهِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يوم يفر المرء من اخيه

text_english: and ˹even˺ their mother and father
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأُمِّهِۦ وَأَبِيهِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وامه وابيه

text_english: and ˹even˺ their spouse and children.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَصَـٰحِبَتِهِۦ وَبَنِيهِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وصاحبته وبنيه

text_english: For then everyone will have enough concern of their own.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لِكُلِّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ شَأْنٌ يُغْنِيهِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لكل امرئ منهم يومئذ شان يغنيه

text_english: On that Day ˹some˺ faces will be bright
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ مُّسْفِرَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وجوه يومئذ مسفرة

text_english: laughing and rejoicing
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ضَاحِكَةٌ مُّسْتَبْشِرَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ضاحكة مستبشرة

text_english: while ˹other˺ faces will be dusty
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَلَيْهَا غَبَرَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ووجوه يومئذ عليها غبرة

text_english: cast in gloom—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: تَرْهَقُهَا قَتَرَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ترهقها قترة

text_english: those are the disbelievers, the ˹wicked˺ sinners.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْكَفَرَةُ ٱلْفَجَرَةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اولئك هم الكفرة الفجرة

text_english: When the sun is put out
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِذَا ٱلشَّمْسُ كُوِّرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اذا الشمس كورت

text_english: and when the stars fall down
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ ٱنكَدَرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا النجوم انكدرت

text_english: and when the mountains are blown away
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلْجِبَالُ سُيِّرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا الجبال سيرت

text_english: and when pregnant camels are left untended
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلْعِشَارُ عُطِّلَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا العشار عطلت

text_english: and when wild beasts are gathered together
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلْوُحُوشُ حُشِرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا الوحوش حشرت

text_english: and when the seas are set on fire
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلْبِحَارُ سُجِّرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا البحار سجرت

text_english: and when the souls ˹and their bodies˺ are paired ˹once more˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّفُوسُ زُوِّجَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا النفوس زوجت

text_english: and when baby girls, buried alive, are asked
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلْمَوْءُۥدَةُ سُئِلَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا الموءودة سئلت

text_english: for what crime they were put to death
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: بِأَىِّ ذَنۢبٍ قُتِلَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: باي ذنب قتلت

text_english: and when the records ˹of deeds˺ are laid open
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلصُّحُفُ نُشِرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا الصحف نشرت

text_english: and when the sky is stripped away
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ كُشِطَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا السماء كشطت

text_english: and when the Hellfire is fiercely flared up
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَحِيمُ سُعِّرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا الجحيم سعرت

text_english: and when Paradise is brought near—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَنَّةُ أُزْلِفَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا الجنة ازلفت

text_english: ˹on that Day˺ each soul will know what ˹deeds˺ it has brought along.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّآ أَحْضَرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: علمت نفس ما احضرت

text_english: I do swear by the receding stars
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلْخُنَّسِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فلا اقسم بالخنس

text_english: which travel and hide
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْكُنَّسِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الجوار الكنس

text_english: and the night as it falls
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا عَسْعَسَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والليل اذا عسعس

text_english: and the day as it breaks!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَا تَنَفَّسَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والصبح اذا تنفس

text_english: Indeed, this ˹Quran˺ is the Word of ˹Allah delivered by Gabriel,˺ a noble messenger-angel
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انه لقول رسول كريم

text_english: full of power, held in honour by the Lord of the Throne
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ذي قوة عند ذي العرش مكين

text_english: obeyed there ˹in heaven˺, and trustworthy.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مُّطَاعٍ ثَمَّ أَمِينٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: مطاع ثم امين

text_english: And your fellow man is not insane.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا صَاحِبُكُم بِمَجْنُونٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما صاحبكم بمجنون

text_english: And he did see that ˹angel˺ on the clear horizon
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ بِٱلْأُفُقِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولقد راه بالافق المبين

text_english: and he does not withhold ˹what is revealed to him of˺ the unseen.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا هُوَ عَلَى ٱلْغَيْبِ بِضَنِينٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما هو على الغيب بضنين

text_english: And this ˹Quran˺ is not the word of an outcast devil.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَيْطَـٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما هو بقول شيطان رجيم

text_english: So what ˹other˺ path would you take?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَيْنَ تَذْهَبُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاين تذهبون

text_english: Surely this ˹Quran˺ is only a reminder to the whole world—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان هو الا ذكر للعالمين

text_english: to whoever of you wills to take the Straight Way.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَسْتَقِيمَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لمن شاء منكم ان يستقيم

text_english: But you cannot will ˹to do so˺, except by the Will of Allah, the Lord of all worlds.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما تشاءون الا ان يشاء الله رب العالمين

text_english: When the sky splits open
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنفَطَرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اذا السماء انفطرت

text_english: and when the stars fall away
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلْكَوَاكِبُ ٱنتَثَرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا الكواكب انتثرت

text_english: and when the seas burst forth
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلْبِحَارُ فُجِّرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا البحار فجرت

text_english: and when the graves spill out
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلْقُبُورُ بُعْثِرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا القبور بعثرت

text_english: ˹then˺ each soul will know what it has sent forth or left behind.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ وَأَخَّرَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: علمت نفس ما قدمت واخرت

text_english: O humanity! What has emboldened you against your Lord, the Most Generous
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يا ايها الانسان ما غرك بربك الكريم

text_english: Who created you, fashioned you, and perfected your design
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكَ فَسَوَّىٰكَ فَعَدَلَكَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذي خلقك فسواك فعدلك

text_english: moulding you in whatever form He willed?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: في اي صورة ما شاء ركبك

text_english: But no! In fact, you deny the ˹final˺ Judgment
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّا بَلْ تُكَذِّبُونَ بِٱلدِّينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا بل تكذبون بالدين

text_english: while you are certainly observed by vigilant
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ لَحَـٰفِظِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وان عليكم لحافظين

text_english: honourable angels, recording ˹everything˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كِرَامًا كَـٰتِبِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كراما كاتبين

text_english: They know whatever you do.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَعْلَمُونَ مَا تَفْعَلُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يعلمون ما تفعلون

text_english: Indeed, the virtuous will be in bliss
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان الابرار لفي نعيم

text_english: and the wicked will be in Hell
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِنَّ ٱلْفُجَّارَ لَفِى جَحِيمٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وان الفجار لفي جحيم

text_english: burning in it on Judgment Day
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَصْلَوْنَهَا يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يصلونها يوم الدين

text_english: and they will have no escape from it.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا هُمْ عَنْهَا بِغَآئِبِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما هم عنها بغائبين

text_english: What will make you realize what Judgment Day is?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما ادراك ما يوم الدين

text_english: Again, what will make you realize what Judgment Day is?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم ما ادراك ما يوم الدين

text_english: ˹It is˺ the Day no soul will be of ˹any˺ benefit to another whatsoever, for all authority on that Day belongs to Allah ˹entirely˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِّنَفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلَّهِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يوم لا تملك نفس لنفس شيئا والامر يومئذ لله

text_english: Woe to the defrauders!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَيْلٌ لِّلْمُطَفِّفِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ويل للمطففين

text_english: Those who take full measure ˹when they buy˺ from people
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذين اذا اكتالوا على الناس يستوفون

text_english: but give less when they measure or weigh for buyers.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا كَالُوهُمْ أَو وَّزَنُوهُمْ يُخْسِرُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا كالوهم او وزنوهم يخسرون

text_english: Do such people not think that they will be resurrected
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَلَا يَظُنُّ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَنَّهُم مَّبْعُوثُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الا يظن اولئك انهم مبعوثون

text_english: for a tremendous Day—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لِيَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ليوم عظيم

text_english: the Day ˹all˺ people will stand before the Lord of all worlds?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلنَّاسُ لِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يوم يقوم الناس لرب العالمين

text_english: But no! The wicked are certainly bound for Sijjîn ˹in the depths of Hell˺—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا ان كتاب الفجار لفي سجين

text_english: and what will make you realize what Sijjîn is?—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سِجِّينٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما ادراك ما سجين

text_english: a fate ˹already˺ sealed.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كتاب مرقوم

text_english: Woe on that Day to the deniers—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ويل يومئذ للمكذبين

text_english: those who deny Judgment Day!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِينَ يُكَذِّبُونَ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذين يكذبون بيوم الدين

text_english: None would deny it except every evildoing transgressor.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما يكذب به الا كل معتد اثيم

text_english: Whenever Our revelations are recited to them, they say, “Ancient fables!”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اذا تتلى عليه اياتنا قال اساطير الاولين

text_english: But no! In fact, their hearts have been stained by all ˹the evil˺ they used to commit!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا بل ران على قلوبهم ما كانوا يكسبون

text_english: Undoubtedly, they will be sealed off from their Lord on that Day.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا انهم عن ربهم يومئذ لمحجوبون

text_english: Moreover, they will surely burn in Hell
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ إِنَّهُمْ لَصَالُوا۟ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم انهم لصالو الجحيم

text_english: and then be told, “This is what you used to deny.”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم يقال هذا الذي كنتم به تكذبون

text_english: But no! The virtuous are certainly bound for ’Illiyûn ˹in elevated Gardens˺—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا ان كتاب الابرار لفي عليين

text_english: and what will make you realize what ’Illiyûn is?—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا عِلِّيُّونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما ادراك ما عليون

text_english: a fate ˹already˺ sealed
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كتاب مرقوم

text_english: witnessed by those nearest ˹to Allah˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَشْهَدُهُ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يشهده المقربون

text_english: Surely the virtuous will be in bliss
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان الابرار لفي نعيم

text_english: ˹seated˺ on ˹canopied˺ couches, gazing around.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: على الارائك ينظرون

text_english: You will recognize on their faces the glow of delight.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: تَعْرِفُ فِى وُجُوهِهِمْ نَضْرَةَ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: تعرف في وجوههم نضرة النعيم

text_english: They will be given a drink of sealed, pure wine
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يُسْقَوْنَ مِن رَّحِيقٍ مَّخْتُومٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يسقون من رحيق مختوم

text_english: whose last sip will smell like musk. So let whoever aspires to this strive ˹diligently˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: خِتَـٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَـٰفِسُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ختامه مسك وفي ذلك فليتنافس المتنافسون

text_english: And this drink’s flavour will come from Tasnîm—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمِزَاجُهُۥ مِن تَسْنِيمٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ومزاجه من تسنيم

text_english: a spring from which those nearest ˹to Allah˺ will drink.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: عينا يشرب بها المقربون

text_english: Indeed, the wicked used to laugh at the believers
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان الذين اجرموا كانوا من الذين امنوا يضحكون

text_english: wink to one another whenever they passed by
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا مَرُّوا۟ بِهِمْ يَتَغَامَزُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا مروا بهم يتغامزون

text_english: and muse ˹over these exploits˺ upon returning to their own people.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُوا۟ فَكِهِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا انقلبوا الى اهلهم انقلبوا فكهين

text_english: And when they saw the faithful, they would say, “These ˹people˺ are truly astray,”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا راوهم قالوا ان هؤلاء لضالون

text_english: even though they were not sent as keepers over the believers.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَآ أُرْسِلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ حَـٰفِظِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما ارسلوا عليهم حافظين

text_english: But on that Day the believers will be laughing at the disbelievers
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاليوم الذين امنوا من الكفار يضحكون

text_english: as they sit on ˹canopied˺ couches, looking on.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: على الارائك ينظرون

text_english: ˹The believers will be asked,˺ “Have the disbelievers ˹not˺ been paid back for what they used to do?”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: هل ثوب الكفار ما كانوا يفعلون

text_english: When the sky bursts open
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنشَقَّتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اذا السماء انشقت

text_english: obeying its Lord as it must
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذنت لربها وحقت

text_english: and when the earth is flattened out
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا ٱلْأَرْضُ مُدَّتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا الارض مدت

text_english: and ejects ˹all˺ its contents and becomes empty
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَلْقَتْ مَا فِيهَا وَتَخَلَّتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والقت ما فيها وتخلت

text_english: obeying its Lord as it must, ˹surely you will all be judged˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذنت لربها وحقت

text_english: O humanity! Indeed, you are labouring restlessly towards your Lord, and will ˹eventually˺ meet the consequences.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَـٰقِيهِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يا ايها الانسان انك كادح الى ربك كدحا فملاقيه

text_english: As for those who are given their record in their right hand
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاما من اوتي كتابه بيمينه

text_english: they will have an easy reckoning
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَسَوْفَ يُحَاسَبُ حِسَابًا يَسِيرًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فسوف يحاسب حسابا يسيرا

text_english: and will return to their people joyfully.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَيَنقَلِبُ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وينقلب الى اهله مسرورا

text_english: And as for those who are given their record ˹in their left hand˺ from behind their backs
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واما من اوتي كتابه وراء ظهره

text_english: they will cry for ˹instant˺ destruction
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَسَوْفَ يَدْعُوا۟ ثُبُورًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فسوف يدعو ثبورا

text_english: and will burn in the blazing Fire.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَيَصْلَىٰ سَعِيرًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ويصلى سعيرا

text_english: For they used to be prideful among their people
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فِىٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انه كان في اهله مسرورا

text_english: thinking they would never return ˹to Allah˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّهُۥ ظَنَّ أَن لَّن يَحُورَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انه ظن ان لن يحور

text_english: Yes ˹they would˺! Surely their Lord has always been All-Seeing of them.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: بلى ان ربه كان به بصيرا

text_english: So, I do swear by the twilight!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلشَّفَقِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فلا اقسم بالشفق

text_english: And by the night and whatever it envelops!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلَّيْلِ وَمَا وَسَقَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والليل وما وسق

text_english: And by the moon when it waxes full!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا ٱتَّسَقَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والقمر اذا اتسق

text_english: You will certainly pass from one state to another.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَتَرْكَبُنَّ طَبَقًا عَن طَبَقٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لتركبن طبقا عن طبق

text_english: So what is the matter with them that they do not believe
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَمَا لَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فما لهم لا يؤمنون

text_english: and when the Quran is recited to them, they do not bow down ˹in submission˺?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ لَا يَسْجُدُونَ ۩
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واذا قرئ عليهم القران لا يسجدون

text_english: In fact, the disbelievers persist in denial.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ يُكَذِّبُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: بل الذين كفروا يكذبون

text_english: But Allah knows best whatever they hide.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يُوعُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والله اعلم بما يوعون

text_english: So give them good news of a painful punishment.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَبَشِّرْهُم بِعَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فبشرهم بعذاب اليم

text_english: But those who believe and do good will have a never-ending reward.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۭ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الا الذين امنوا وعملوا الصالحات لهم اجر غير ممنون

text_english: By the sky full of constellations
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْبُرُوجِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والسماء ذات البروج

text_english: and the promised Day ˹of Judgment˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْمَوْعُودِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واليوم الموعود

text_english: and the witness and what is witnessed!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَشَاهِدٍ وَمَشْهُودٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وشاهد ومشهود

text_english: Condemned are the makers of the ditch—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: قُتِلَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْأُخْدُودِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: قتل اصحاب الاخدود

text_english: the fire ˹pit˺, filled with fuel—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلنَّارِ ذَاتِ ٱلْوَقُودِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: النار ذات الوقود

text_english: when they sat around it
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِذْ هُمْ عَلَيْهَا قُعُودٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اذ هم عليها قعود

text_english: watching what they had ˹ordered to be˺ done to the believers
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفْعَلُونَ بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ شُهُودٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وهم على ما يفعلون بالمؤمنين شهود

text_english: who they resented for no reason other than belief in Allah—the Almighty, the Praiseworthy—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما نقموا منهم الا ان يؤمنوا بالله العزيز الحميد

text_english: ˹the One˺ to Whom belongs the kingdom of the heavens and earth. And Allah is a Witness over all things.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذي له ملك السماوات والارض والله على كل شيء شهيد

text_english: Those who persecute the believing men and women and then do not repent will certainly suffer the punishment of Hell and the torment of burning.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان الذين فتنوا المؤمنين والمؤمنات ثم لم يتوبوا فلهم عذاب جهنم ولهم عذاب الحريق

text_english: Surely those who believe and do good will have Gardens under which rivers flow. That is the greatest triumph.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان الذين امنوا وعملوا الصالحات لهم جنات تجري من تحتها الانهار ذلك الفوز الكبير

text_english: Indeed, the ˹crushing˺ grip of your Lord is severe.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ بَطْشَ رَبِّكَ لَشَدِيدٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان بطش ربك لشديد

text_english: ˹For˺ He is certainly the One Who originates and resurrects ˹all˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ يُبْدِئُ وَيُعِيدُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انه هو يبدئ ويعيد

text_english: And He is the All-Forgiving, All-Loving—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَهُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلْوَدُودُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وهو الغفور الودود

text_english: Lord of the Throne, the All-Glorious
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ذُو ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْمَجِيدُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ذو العرش المجيد

text_english: Doer of whatever He wills.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَعَّالٌ لِّمَا يُرِيدُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فعال لما يريد

text_english: Has the story of the ˹destroyed˺ forces reached you ˹O Prophet˺—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلْجُنُودِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: هل اتاك حديث الجنود

text_english: ˹the forces of˺ Pharaoh and Thamûd?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فِرْعَوْنَ وَثَمُودَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فرعون وثمود

text_english: Yet the disbelievers ˹still˺ persist in denial.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى تَكْذِيبٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: بل الذين كفروا في تكذيب

text_english: But Allah encompasses them from all sides.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱللَّهُ مِن وَرَآئِهِم مُّحِيطٌۢ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والله من ورائهم محيط

text_english: In fact, this is a glorious Quran
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: بَلْ هُوَ قُرْءَانٌ مَّجِيدٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: بل هو قران مجيد

text_english: ˹recorded˺ in a Preserved Tablet.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فِى لَوْحٍ مَّحْفُوظٍۭ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: في لوح محفوظ

text_english: By the heaven and the nightly star!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلطَّارِقِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والسماء والطارق

text_english: And what will make you realize what the nightly star is?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلطَّارِقُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما ادراك ما الطارق

text_english: ˹It is˺ the star of piercing brightness.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلنَّجْمُ ٱلثَّاقِبُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: النجم الثاقب

text_english: There is no soul without a vigilant angel ˹recording everything˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٍ لَّمَّا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان كل نفس لما عليها حافظ

text_english: Let people then consider what they were created from!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مِمَّ خُلِقَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فلينظر الانسان مم خلق

text_english: ˹They were˺ created from a spurting fluid
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: خُلِقَ مِن مَّآءٍ دَافِقٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: خلق من ماء دافق

text_english: stemming from between the backbone and the ribcage.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَخْرُجُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ ٱلصُّلْبِ وَٱلتَّرَآئِبِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يخرج من بين الصلب والترائب

text_english: Surely He is fully capable of bringing them back ˹to life˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَجْعِهِۦ لَقَادِرٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انه على رجعه لقادر

text_english: on the Day all secrets will be disclosed.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَوْمَ تُبْلَى ٱلسَّرَآئِرُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يوم تبلى السرائر

text_english: Then one will have neither power nor ˹any˺ helper.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٍ وَلَا نَاصِرٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فما له من قوة ولا ناصر

text_english: By the sky with its recurring cycles
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلرَّجْعِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والسماء ذات الرجع

text_english: and the earth with its sprouting plants!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلْأَرْضِ ذَاتِ ٱلصَّدْعِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والارض ذات الصدع

text_english: Surely this ˹Quran˺ is a decisive word
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلٌ فَصْلٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انه لقول فصل

text_english: and is not to be taken lightly.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا هُوَ بِٱلْهَزْلِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما هو بالهزل

text_english: They are certainly devising ˹evil˺ plans
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّهُمْ يَكِيدُونَ كَيْدًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انهم يكيدون كيدا

text_english: but I too am planning.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَكِيدُ كَيْدًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واكيد كيدا

text_english: So bear with the disbelievers ˹O Prophet˺. Let them be for ˹just˺ a little while.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَمَهِّلِ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ أَمْهِلْهُمْ رُوَيْدًۢا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فمهل الكافرين امهلهم رويدا

text_english: Glorify the Name of your Lord, the Most High
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: سَبِّحِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ ٱلْأَعْلَى
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: سبح اسم ربك الاعلى

text_english: Who created and ˹perfectly˺ fashioned ˹all˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذي خلق فسوى

text_english: and Who ordained precisely and inspired accordingly
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلَّذِى قَدَّرَ فَهَدَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والذي قدر فهدى

text_english: and Who brings forth ˹green˺ pasture
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَخْرَجَ ٱلْمَرْعَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والذي اخرج المرعى

text_english: then reduces it to withered chaff.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَجَعَلَهُۥ غُثَآءً أَحْوَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فجعله غثاء احوى

text_english: We will have you recite ˹the Quran, O  Prophet,˺ so you will not forget ˹any of it˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: سَنُقْرِئُكَ فَلَا تَنسَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: سنقرئك فلا تنسى

text_english: unless Allah wills otherwise. He surely knows what is open and what is hidden.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ وَمَا يَخْفَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الا ما شاء الله انه يعلم الجهر وما يخفى

text_english: We will facilitate for you the Way of Ease.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَنُيَسِّرُكَ لِلْيُسْرَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ونيسرك لليسرى

text_english: So ˹always˺ remind ˹with the Quran˺—˹even˺ if the reminder is beneficial ˹only to some˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَذَكِّرْ إِن نَّفَعَتِ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فذكر ان نفعت الذكرى

text_english: Those in awe ˹of Allah˺ will be mindful ˹of it˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: سَيَذَّكَّرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: سيذكر من يخشى

text_english: But it will be shunned by the most wretched
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَيَتَجَنَّبُهَا ٱلْأَشْقَى
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ويتجنبها الاشقى

text_english: who will burn in the greatest Fire
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِى يَصْلَى ٱلنَّارَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذي يصلى النار الكبرى

text_english: where they will not ˹be able to˺ live or die.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم لا يموت فيها ولا يحيى

text_english: Successful indeed are those who purify themselves
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: قد افلح من تزكى

text_english: remember the Name of their Lord, and pray.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَذَكَرَ ٱسْمَ رَبِّهِۦ فَصَلَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وذكر اسم ربه فصلى

text_english: But you ˹deniers only˺ prefer the life of this world
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: بَلْ تُؤْثِرُونَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: بل تؤثرون الحياة الدنيا

text_english: even though the Hereafter is far better and more lasting.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلْـَٔاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والاخرة خير وابقى

text_english: This is certainly ˹mentioned˺ in the earlier Scriptures—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَفِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان هذا لفي الصحف الاولى

text_english: the Scriptures of Abraham and Moses.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: صُحُفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَمُوسَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: صحف ابراهيم وموسى

text_english: Has the news of the Overwhelming Event reached you ˹O Prophet˺?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلْغَـٰشِيَةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: هل اتاك حديث الغاشية

text_english: On that Day ˹some˺ faces will be downcast
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ خَـٰشِعَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وجوه يومئذ خاشعة

text_english: ˹totally˺ overburdened, exhausted
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: عَامِلَةٌ نَّاصِبَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: عاملة ناصبة

text_english: burning in a scorching Fire
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: تَصْلَىٰ نَارًا حَامِيَةً
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: تصلى نارا حامية

text_english: left to drink from a scalding spring.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: تُسْقَىٰ مِنْ عَيْنٍ ءَانِيَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: تسقى من عين انية

text_english: They will have no food except a foul, thorny shrub
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَّيْسَ لَهُمْ طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِن ضَرِيعٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ليس لهم طعام الا من ضريع

text_english: neither nourishing nor satisfying hunger.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَّا يُسْمِنُ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِن جُوعٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لا يسمن ولا يغني من جوع

text_english: On that Day ˹other˺ faces will be glowing with bliss
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَّاعِمَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وجوه يومئذ ناعمة

text_english: ˹fully˺ pleased with their striving
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لِّسَعْيِهَا رَاضِيَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لسعيها راضية

text_english: in an elevated Garden
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فِى جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: في جنة عالية

text_english: where no idle talk will be heard.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَّا تَسْمَعُ فِيهَا لَـٰغِيَةً
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لا تسمع فيها لاغية

text_english: In it will be a running spring
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فِيهَا عَيْنٌ جَارِيَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فيها عين جارية

text_english: along with thrones raised high
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فِيهَا سُرُرٌ مَّرْفُوعَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فيها سرر مرفوعة

text_english: and cups set at hand
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَكْوَابٌ مَّوْضُوعَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واكواب موضوعة

text_english: and ˹fine˺ cushions lined up
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَنَمَارِقُ مَصْفُوفَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ونمارق مصفوفة

text_english: and ˹splendid˺ carpets spread out.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَزَرَابِىُّ مَبْثُوثَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وزرابي مبثوثة

text_english: Do they not ever reflect on camels—how they were ˹masterfully˺ created;
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى ٱلْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: افلا ينظرون الى الابل كيف خلقت

text_english: and the sky—how it was raised ˹high˺;
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ كَيْفَ رُفِعَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والى السماء كيف رفعت

text_english: and the mountains—how they were firmly set up;
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِلَى ٱلْجِبَالِ كَيْفَ نُصِبَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والى الجبال كيف نصبت

text_english: and the earth—how it was levelled out?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَيْفَ سُطِحَتْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والى الارض كيف سطحت

text_english: So, ˹continue to˺ remind ˹all, O  Prophet˺, for your duty is only to remind.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَذَكِّرْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُذَكِّرٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فذكر انما انت مذكر

text_english: You are not ˹there˺ to compel them ˹to believe˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَّسْتَ عَلَيْهِم بِمُصَيْطِرٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لست عليهم بمصيطر

text_english: But whoever turns away, persisting in disbelief
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِلَّا مَن تَوَلَّىٰ وَكَفَرَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الا من تولى وكفر

text_english: then Allah will inflict upon them the major punishment.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَيُعَذِّبُهُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَكْبَرَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فيعذبه الله العذاب الاكبر

text_english: Surely to Us is their return
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ إِلَيْنَآ إِيَابَهُمْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان الينا ايابهم

text_english: then surely with Us is their reckoning.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا حِسَابَهُم
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم ان علينا حسابهم

text_english: By the dawn
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلْفَجْرِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والفجر

text_english: and the ten nights
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَيَالٍ عَشْرٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وليال عشر

text_english: and the even and the odd
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلشَّفْعِ وَٱلْوَتْرِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والشفع والوتر

text_english: and the night when it passes!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا يَسْرِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والليل اذا يسر

text_english: Is all this ˹not˺ a sufficient oath for those who have sense?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: هَلْ فِى ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٌ لِّذِى حِجْرٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: هل في ذلك قسم لذي حجر

text_english: Did you not see how your Lord dealt with ’Ȃd—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الم تر كيف فعل ربك بعاد

text_english: ˹the people˺ of Iram—with ˹their˺ great stature
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِرَمَ ذَاتِ ٱلْعِمَادِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ارم ذات العماد

text_english: unmatched in any other land;
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّتِى لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: التي لم يخلق مثلها في البلاد

text_english: and Thamûd who carved ˹their homes into˺ the rocks in the ˹Stone˺ Valley;
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَثَمُودَ ٱلَّذِينَ جَابُوا۟ ٱلصَّخْرَ بِٱلْوَادِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وثمود الذين جابوا الصخر بالواد

text_english: and the Pharaoh of mighty structures?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَفِرْعَوْنَ ذِى ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وفرعون ذي الاوتاد

text_english: They all transgressed throughout the land
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِينَ طَغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذين طغوا في البلاد

text_english: spreading much corruption there.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَكْثَرُوا۟ فِيهَا ٱلْفَسَادَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاكثروا فيها الفساد

text_english: So your Lord unleashed on them a scourge of punishment.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَصَبَّ عَلَيْهِمْ رَبُّكَ سَوْطَ عَذَابٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فصب عليهم ربك سوط عذاب

text_english: ˹For˺ your Lord is truly vigilant.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَبِٱلْمِرْصَادِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان ربك لبالمرصاد

text_english: Now, whenever a human being is tested by their Lord through ˹His˺ generosity and blessings, they boast, “My Lord has ˹deservedly˺ honoured me!”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاما الانسان اذا ما ابتلاه ربه فاكرمه ونعمه فيقول ربي اكرمن

text_english: But when He tests them by limiting their provision, they protest, “My Lord has ˹undeservedly˺ humiliated me!”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهَـٰنَنِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واما اذا ما ابتلاه فقدر عليه رزقه فيقول ربي اهانن

text_english: Absolutely not! In fact, you are not ˹even˺ gracious to the orphan
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّا ۖ بَل لَّا تُكْرِمُونَ ٱلْيَتِيمَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا بل لا تكرمون اليتيم

text_english: nor do you urge one another to feed the poor.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَا تَحَـٰٓضُّونَ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولا تحاضون على طعام المسكين

text_english: And you devour ˹others’˺ inheritance greedily
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَتَأْكُلُونَ ٱلتُّرَاثَ أَكْلًا لَّمًّا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وتاكلون التراث اكلا لما

text_english: and love wealth fervently.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَتُحِبُّونَ ٱلْمَالَ حُبًّا جَمًّا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وتحبون المال حبا جما

text_english: Enough! When the earth is entirely crushed over and over
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّآ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا اذا دكت الارض دكا دكا

text_english: and your Lord comes ˹to judge˺ with angels, rank upon rank
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَجَآءَ رَبُّكَ وَٱلْمَلَكُ صَفًّا صَفًّا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وجاء ربك والملك صفا صفا

text_english: and Hell is brought forth on that Day—this is when every ˹disbelieving˺ person will remember ˹their own sins˺. But what is the use of remembering then?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وجيء يومئذ بجهنم يومئذ يتذكر الانسان وانى له الذكرى

text_english: They will cry, “I wish I had sent forth ˹something good˺ for my ˹true˺ life.”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى قَدَّمْتُ لِحَيَاتِى
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يقول يا ليتني قدمت لحياتي

text_english: On that Day He will punish ˹them˺ severely, like no other
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُعَذِّبُ عَذَابَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فيومئذ لا يعذب عذابه احد

text_english: and bind ˹them˺ tightly, like no other.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَا يُوثِقُ وَثَاقَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولا يوثق وثاقه احد

text_english: ˹Allah will say to the righteous,˺ “O tranquil soul!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَـٰٓأَيَّتُهَا ٱلنَّفْسُ ٱلْمُطْمَئِنَّةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يا ايتها النفس المطمئنة

text_english: Return to your Lord, well pleased ˹with Him˺ and well pleasing ˹to Him˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱرْجِعِىٓ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةً مَّرْضِيَّةً
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ارجعي الى ربك راضية مرضية

text_english: So join My servants
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَٱدْخُلِى فِى عِبَـٰدِى
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فادخلي في عبادي

text_english: and enter My Paradise.”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱدْخُلِى جَنَّتِى
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وادخلي جنتي

text_english: I do swear by this city ˹of Mecca˺—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لا اقسم بهذا البلد

text_english: even though you ˹O Prophet˺ are subject to abuse in this city—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَنتَ حِلٌّۢ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وانت حل بهذا البلد

text_english: and by every parent and ˹their˺ child!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَوَالِدٍ وَمَا وَلَدَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ووالد وما ولد

text_english: Indeed, We have created humankind in ˹constant˺ struggle.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِى كَبَدٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لقد خلقنا الانسان في كبد

text_english: Do they think that no one has power over them
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّن يَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ أَحَدٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ايحسب ان لن يقدر عليه احد

text_english: boasting, “I have wasted enormous wealth!”?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَقُولُ أَهْلَكْتُ مَالًا لُّبَدًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يقول اهلكت مالا لبدا

text_english: Do they think that no one sees them?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّمْ يَرَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ايحسب ان لم يره احد

text_english: Have We not given them two eyes
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَلَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُۥ عَيْنَيْنِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الم نجعل له عينين

text_english: a tongue, and two lips;
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلِسَانًا وَشَفَتَيْنِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولسانا وشفتين

text_english: and shown them the two ways ˹of right and wrong˺?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَهَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلنَّجْدَيْنِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وهديناه النجدين

text_english: If only they had attempted the challenging path ˹of goodness instead˺!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَلَا ٱقْتَحَمَ ٱلْعَقَبَةَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فلا اقتحم العقبة

text_english: And what will make you realize what ˹attempting˺ the challenging path is?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْعَقَبَةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما ادراك ما العقبة

text_english: It is to free a slave
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَكُّ رَقَبَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فك رقبة

text_english: or to give food in times of famine
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَوْ إِطْعَـٰمٌ فِى يَوْمٍ ذِى مَسْغَبَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: او اطعام في يوم ذي مسغبة

text_english: to an orphaned relative
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَتِيمًا ذَا مَقْرَبَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يتيما ذا مقربة

text_english: or to a poor person in distress
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَوْ مِسْكِينًا ذَا مَتْرَبَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: او مسكينا ذا متربة

text_english: and—above all—to be one of those who have faith and urge each other to perseverance and urge each other to compassion.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْمَرْحَمَةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم كان من الذين امنوا وتواصوا بالصبر وتواصوا بالمرحمة

text_english: These are the people of the right.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اولئك اصحاب الميمنة

text_english: As for those who deny Our signs, they are the people of the left.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا هُمْ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والذين كفروا باياتنا هم اصحاب المشامة

text_english: The Fire will be sealed over them.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: عَلَيْهِمْ نَارٌ مُّؤْصَدَةٌۢ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: عليهم نار مؤصدة

text_english: By the sun and its brightness
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلشَّمْسِ وَضُحَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والشمس وضحاها

text_english: and the moon as it follows it
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا تَلَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والقمر اذا تلاها

text_english: and the day as it unveils it
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلنَّهَارِ إِذَا جَلَّىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والنهار اذا جلاها

text_english: and the night as it conceals it!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والليل اذا يغشاها

text_english: And by heaven and ˹the One˺ Who built it
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا بَنَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والسماء وما بناها

text_english: and the earth and ˹the One˺ Who spread it!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا طَحَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والارض وما طحاها

text_english: And by the soul and ˹the One˺ Who fashioned it
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَنَفْسٍ وَمَا سَوَّىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ونفس وما سواها

text_english: then with ˹the knowledge of˺ right and wrong inspired it!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَلْهَمَهَا فُجُورَهَا وَتَقْوَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فالهمها فجورها وتقواها

text_english: Successful indeed is the one who purifies their soul
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَن زَكَّىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: قد افلح من زكاها

text_english: and doomed is the one who corrupts it!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَقَدْ خَابَ مَن دَسَّىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وقد خاب من دساها

text_english: Thamûd rejected ˹the truth˺ out of arrogance
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِطَغْوَىٰهَآ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كذبت ثمود بطغواها

text_english: when the most wicked of them was roused ˹to kill the she-camel˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِذِ ٱنۢبَعَثَ أَشْقَىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اذ انبعث اشقاها

text_english: But the messenger of Allah warned them, “˹Do not disturb˺ Allah’s camel and her ˹turn to˺ drink!”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَقَالَ لَهُمْ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ نَاقَةَ ٱللَّهِ وَسُقْيَـٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فقال لهم رسول الله ناقة الله وسقياها

text_english: Still they defied him and slaughtered her. So their Lord crushed them for their crime, levelling all to the ground.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَعَقَرُوهَا فَدَمْدَمَ عَلَيْهِمْ رَبُّهُم بِذَنۢبِهِمْ فَسَوَّىٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فكذبوه فعقروها فدمدم عليهم ربهم بذنبهم فسواها

text_english: He has no fear of consequences.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَا يَخَافُ عُقْبَـٰهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولا يخاف عقباها

text_english: By the night when it covers
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والليل اذا يغشى

text_english: and the day when it shines!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلنَّهَارِ إِذَا تَجَلَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والنهار اذا تجلى

text_english: And by ˹the One˺ Who created male and female!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا خَلَقَ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما خلق الذكر والانثى

text_english: Surely the ends you strive for are diverse.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ سَعْيَكُمْ لَشَتَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان سعيكم لشتى

text_english: As for the one who is charitable, mindful ˹of Allah˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أَعْطَىٰ وَٱتَّقَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاما من اعطى واتقى

text_english: and ˹firmly˺ believes in the finest reward
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَصَدَّقَ بِٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وصدق بالحسنى

text_english: We will facilitate for them the Way of Ease.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهُۥ لِلْيُسْرَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فسنيسره لليسرى

text_english: And as for the one who is stingy, indifferent ˹to Allah˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَمَّا مَنۢ بَخِلَ وَٱسْتَغْنَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واما من بخل واستغنى

text_english: and ˹staunchly˺ denies the finest reward
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَكَذَّبَ بِٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وكذب بالحسنى

text_english: We will facilitate for them the path of hardship.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهُۥ لِلْعُسْرَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فسنيسره للعسرى

text_english: And their wealth will be of no benefit to them when they tumble ˹into Hell˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما يغني عنه ماله اذا تردى

text_english: It is certainly upon Us ˹alone˺ to show ˹the way to˺ guidance.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا لَلْهُدَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان علينا للهدى

text_english: And surely to Us ˹alone˺ belong this life and the next.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِنَّ لَنَا لَلْـَٔاخِرَةَ وَٱلْأُولَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وان لنا للاخرة والاولى

text_english: And so I have warned you of a raging Fire
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَنذَرْتُكُمْ نَارًا تَلَظَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فانذرتكم نارا تلظى

text_english: in which none will burn except the most wretched—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَا يَصْلَىٰهَآ إِلَّا ٱلْأَشْقَى
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لا يصلاها الا الاشقى

text_english: who deny and turn away.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِى كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذي كذب وتولى

text_english: But the righteous will be spared from it—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَسَيُجَنَّبُهَا ٱلْأَتْقَى
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وسيجنبها الاتقى

text_english: who donate ˹some of˺ their wealth only to purify themselves
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِى يُؤْتِى مَالَهُۥ يَتَزَكَّىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذي يؤتي ماله يتزكى

text_english: not in return for someone’s favours
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا لِأَحَدٍ عِندَهُۥ مِن نِّعْمَةٍ تُجْزَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما لاحد عنده من نعمة تجزى

text_english: but seeking the pleasure of their Lord, the Most High.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِلَّا ٱبْتِغَآءَ وَجْهِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الا ابتغاء وجه ربه الاعلى

text_english: They will certainly be pleased.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَسَوْفَ يَرْضَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولسوف يرضى

text_english: By the morning sunlight
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلضُّحَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والضحى

text_english: and the night when it falls still!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا سَجَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والليل اذا سجى

text_english: Your Lord ˹O Prophet˺ has not abandoned you, nor has He become hateful ˹of you˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ما ودعك ربك وما قلى

text_english: And the next life is certainly far better for you than this one.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَلْـَٔاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ لَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وللاخرة خير لك من الاولى

text_english: And ˹surely˺ your Lord will give so much to you that you will be pleased.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرْضَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولسوف يعطيك ربك فترضى

text_english: Did He not find you as an orphan then sheltered you?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَلَمْ يَجِدْكَ يَتِيمًا فَـَٔاوَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الم يجدك يتيما فاوى

text_english: Did He not find you unguided then guided you?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَوَجَدَكَ ضَآلًّا فَهَدَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ووجدك ضالا فهدى

text_english: And did He not find you needy then satisfied your needs?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَوَجَدَكَ عَآئِلًا فَأَغْنَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ووجدك عائلا فاغنى

text_english: So do not oppress the orphan
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَمَّا ٱلْيَتِيمَ فَلَا تَقْهَرْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاما اليتيم فلا تقهر

text_english: nor repulse the beggar.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَمَّا ٱلسَّآئِلَ فَلَا تَنْهَرْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واما السائل فلا تنهر

text_english: And proclaim the blessings of your Lord.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَمَّا بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ فَحَدِّثْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واما بنعمة ربك فحدث

text_english: Have We not uplifted your heart for you ˹O Prophet˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَلَمْ نَشْرَحْ لَكَ صَدْرَكَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الم نشرح لك صدرك

text_english: relieved you of the burden
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَوَضَعْنَا عَنكَ وِزْرَكَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ووضعنا عنك وزرك

text_english: which weighed so heavily on your back
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنقَضَ ظَهْرَكَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذي انقض ظهرك

text_english: and elevated your renown for you?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَرَفَعْنَا لَكَ ذِكْرَكَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ورفعنا لك ذكرك

text_english: So, surely with hardship comes ease.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَإِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فان مع العسر يسرا

text_english: Surely with ˹that˺ hardship comes ˹more˺ ease.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان مع العسر يسرا

text_english: So once you have fulfilled ˹your duty˺, strive ˹in devotion˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَإِذَا فَرَغْتَ فَٱنصَبْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاذا فرغت فانصب

text_english: turning to your Lord ˹alone˺ with hope.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَٱرْغَب
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والى ربك فارغب

text_english: By the fig and the olive ˹of Jerusalem˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلتِّينِ وَٱلزَّيْتُونِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والتين والزيتون

text_english: and Mount Sinai
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَطُورِ سِينِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وطور سينين

text_english: and this secure city ˹of Mecca˺!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ ٱلْأَمِينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وهذا البلد الامين

text_english: Indeed, We created humans in the best form.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لقد خلقنا الانسان في احسن تقويم

text_english: But We will reduce them to the lowest of the low ˹in Hell˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ رَدَدْنَـٰهُ أَسْفَلَ سَـٰفِلِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم رددناه اسفل سافلين

text_english: except those who believe and do good—they will have a never-ending reward.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الا الذين امنوا وعملوا الصالحات فلهم اجر غير ممنون

text_english: Now, what makes you deny the ˹final˺ Judgment?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَمَا يُكَذِّبُكَ بَعْدُ بِٱلدِّينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فما يكذبك بعد بالدين

text_english: Is Allah not the most just of all judges?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَلَيْسَ ٱللَّهُ بِأَحْكَمِ ٱلْحَـٰكِمِينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اليس الله باحكم الحاكمين

text_english: Read, ˹O Prophet,˺ in the Name of your Lord Who created—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱقْرَأْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اقرا باسم ربك الذي خلق

text_english: created humans from a clinging clot.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِنْ عَلَقٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: خلق الانسان من علق

text_english: Read! And your Lord is the Most Generous
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱقْرَأْ وَرَبُّكَ ٱلْأَكْرَمُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اقرا وربك الاكرم

text_english: Who taught by the pen—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَ بِٱلْقَلَمِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذي علم بالقلم

text_english: taught humanity what they knew not.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: عَلَّمَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مَا لَمْ يَعْلَمْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: علم الانسان ما لم يعلم

text_english: Most certainly, one exceeds all bounds
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّآ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لَيَطْغَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا ان الانسان ليطغى

text_english: once they think they are self-sufficient.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَن رَّءَاهُ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان راه استغنى

text_english: ˹But˺ surely to your Lord is the return ˹of all˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلرُّجْعَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان الى ربك الرجعى

text_english: Have you seen the man who prevents
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يَنْهَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ارايت الذي ينهى

text_english: a servant ˹of Ours˺ from praying?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: عَبْدًا إِذَا صَلَّىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: عبدا اذا صلى

text_english: What if this ˹servant˺ is ˹rightly˺ guided
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَانَ عَلَى ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ارايت ان كان على الهدى

text_english: or encourages righteousness?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَوْ أَمَرَ بِٱلتَّقْوَىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: او امر بالتقوى

text_english: What if that ˹man˺ persists in denial and turns away?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ارايت ان كذب وتولى

text_english: Does he not know that Allah sees ˹all˺?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَلَمْ يَعْلَم بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَرَىٰ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الم يعلم بان الله يرى

text_english: But no! If he does not desist, We will certainly drag him by the forelock—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمْ يَنتَهِ لَنَسْفَعًۢا بِٱلنَّاصِيَةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا لئن لم ينته لنسفعا بالناصية

text_english: a lying, sinful forelock.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: نَاصِيَةٍ كَـٰذِبَةٍ خَاطِئَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ناصية كاذبة خاطئة

text_english: So let him call his associates.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَلْيَدْعُ نَادِيَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فليدع ناديه

text_english: We will call the wardens of Hell.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: سَنَدْعُ ٱلزَّبَانِيَةَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: سندع الزبانية

text_english: Again, no! Never obey him ˹O Prophet˺! Rather, ˹continue to˺ prostrate and draw near ˹to Allah˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّا لَا تُطِعْهُ وَٱسْجُدْ وَٱقْتَرِب ۩
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا لا تطعه واسجد واقترب

text_english: Indeed, ˹it is˺ We ˹Who˺ sent this ˹Quran˺ down on the Night of Glory.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةِ ٱلْقَدْرِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انا انزلناه في ليلة القدر

text_english: And what will make you realize what the Night of Glory is?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ
