text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما ادراك ما ليلة القدر

text_english: The Night of Glory is better than a thousand months.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ليلة القدر خير من الف شهر

text_english: That night the angels and the ˹holy˺ spirit descend, by the permission of their Lord, for every ˹decreed˺ matter.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: تنزل الملائكة والروح فيها باذن ربهم من كل امر

text_english: It is all peace until the break of dawn.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: سَلَـٰمٌ هِىَ حَتَّىٰ مَطْلَعِ ٱلْفَجْرِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: سلام هي حتى مطلع الفجر

text_english: The disbelievers from the People of the Book and the polytheists were not going to desist ˹from disbelief˺ until the clear proof came to them:
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَمْ يَكُنِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ مُنفَكِّينَ حَتَّىٰ تَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لم يكن الذين كفروا من اهل الكتاب والمشركين منفكين حتى تاتيهم البينة

text_english: a messenger from Allah, reciting scrolls of ˹utmost˺ purity
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: رَسُولٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةً
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: رسول من الله يتلو صحفا مطهرة

text_english: containing upright commandments.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فِيهَا كُتُبٌ قَيِّمَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فيها كتب قيمة

text_english: It was not until this clear proof came to the People of the Book that they became divided ˹about his prophethood˺—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما تفرق الذين اوتوا الكتاب الا من بعد ما جاءتهم البينة

text_english: even though they were only commanded to worship Allah ˹alone˺ with sincere devotion to Him in all uprightness, establish prayer, and pay alms-tax. That is the upright Way.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما امروا الا ليعبدوا الله مخلصين له الدين حنفاء ويقيموا الصلاة ويؤتوا الزكاة وذلك دين القيمة

text_english: Indeed, those who disbelieve from the People of the Book and the polytheists will be in the Fire of Hell, to stay there forever. They are the worst of ˹all˺ beings.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان الذين كفروا من اهل الكتاب والمشركين في نار جهنم خالدين فيها اولئك هم شر البرية

text_english: Indeed, those who believe and do good—they are the best of ˹all˺ beings.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان الذين امنوا وعملوا الصالحات اولئك هم خير البرية

text_english: Their reward with their Lord will be Gardens of Eternity, under which rivers flow, to stay there for ever and ever. Allah is pleased with them and they are pleased with Him. This is ˹only˺ for those in awe of their Lord.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا ۖ رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: جزاؤهم عند ربهم جنات عدن تجري من تحتها الانهار خالدين فيها ابدا رضي الله عنهم ورضوا عنه ذلك لمن خشي ربه

text_english: When the earth is shaken ˹in˺ its ultimate quaking
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اذا زلزلت الارض زلزالها

text_english: and when the earth throws out ˹all˺ its contents
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَخْرَجَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ أَثْقَالَهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واخرجت الارض اثقالها

text_english: and humanity cries, “What is wrong with it?”—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَقَالَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا لَهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وقال الانسان ما لها

text_english: on that Day the earth will recount everything
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُحَدِّثُ أَخْبَارَهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يومئذ تحدث اخبارها

text_english: having been inspired by your Lord ˹to do so˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: بِأَنَّ رَبَّكَ أَوْحَىٰ لَهَا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: بان ربك اوحى لها

text_english: On that Day people will proceed in separate groups to be shown ˹the consequences of˺ their deeds.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يومئذ يصدر الناس اشتاتا ليروا اعمالهم

text_english: So whoever does an atom’s weight of good will see it.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فمن يعمل مثقال ذرة خيرا يره

text_english: And whoever does an atom’s weight of evil will see it.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ومن يعمل مثقال ذرة شرا يره

text_english: ’ By the galloping, panting horses
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلْعَـٰدِيَـٰتِ ضَبْحًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والعاديات ضبحا

text_english: striking sparks of fire ˹with their hoofs˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَٱلْمُورِيَـٰتِ قَدْحًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فالموريات قدحا

text_english: launching raids at dawn
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَٱلْمُغِيرَٰتِ صُبْحًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فالمغيرات صبحا

text_english: stirring up ˹clouds of˺ dust
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَثَرْنَ بِهِۦ نَقْعًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاثرن به نقعا

text_english: and penetrating into the heart of enemy lines!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَوَسَطْنَ بِهِۦ جَمْعًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فوسطن به جمعا

text_english: Surely humankind is ungrateful to their Lord—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لِرَبِّهِۦ لَكَنُودٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان الانسان لربه لكنود

text_english: and they certainly attest to this—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ ذَٰلِكَ لَشَهِيدٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وانه على ذلك لشهيد

text_english: and they are truly extreme in their love of ˹worldly˺ gains.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَإِنَّهُۥ لِحُبِّ ٱلْخَيْرِ لَشَدِيدٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وانه لحب الخير لشديد

text_english: Do they not know that when the contents of the graves will be spilled out
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ۞ أَفَلَا يَعْلَمُ إِذَا بُعْثِرَ مَا فِى ٱلْقُبُورِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: افلا يعلم اذا بعثر ما في القبور

text_english: and the secrets of the hearts will be laid bare—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَحُصِّلَ مَا فِى ٱلصُّدُورِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وحصل ما في الصدور

text_english: surely their Lord is All-Aware of them on that Day.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ رَبَّهُم بِهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّخَبِيرٌۢ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان ربهم بهم يومئذ لخبير

text_english: The Striking Disaster!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: القارعة

text_english: What is the Striking Disaster?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ما القارعة

text_english: And what will make you realize what the Striking Disaster is?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما ادراك ما القارعة

text_english: ˹It is˺ the Day people will be like scattered moths
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَوْمَ يَكُونُ ٱلنَّاسُ كَٱلْفَرَاشِ ٱلْمَبْثُوثِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يوم يكون الناس كالفراش المبثوث

text_english: and the mountains will be like carded wool.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ ٱلْمَنفُوشِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وتكون الجبال كالعهن المنفوش

text_english: So as for those whose scale is heavy ˹with good deeds˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأَمَّا مَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فاما من ثقلت موازينه

text_english: they will be in a life of bliss.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فهو في عيشة راضية

text_english: And as for those whose scale is light
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: واما من خفت موازينه

text_english: their home will be the abyss.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَأُمُّهُۥ هَاوِيَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فامه هاوية

text_english: And what will make you realize what that is?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا هِيَهْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما ادراك ما هيه

text_english: ˹It is˺ a scorching Fire.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: نَارٌ حَامِيَةٌۢ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: نار حامية

text_english: Competition for more ˹gains˺ diverts you ˹from Allah˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَلْهَىٰكُمُ ٱلتَّكَاثُرُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الهاكم التكاثر

text_english: until you end up in ˹your˺ graves.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: حَتَّىٰ زُرْتُمُ ٱلْمَقَابِرَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: حتى زرتم المقابر

text_english: But no! You will soon come to know.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا سوف تعلمون

text_english: Again, no! You will soon come to know.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم كلا سوف تعلمون

text_english: Indeed, if you were to know ˹your fate˺ with certainty, ˹you would have acted differently˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّا لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عِلْمَ ٱلْيَقِينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا لو تعلمون علم اليقين

text_english: ˹But˺ you will surely see the Hellfire.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَتَرَوُنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لترون الجحيم

text_english: Again, you will surely see it with the eye of certainty.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ لَتَرَوُنَّهَا عَيْنَ ٱلْيَقِينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم لترونها عين اليقين

text_english: Then, on that Day, you will definitely be questioned about ˹your worldly˺ pleasures.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ثُمَّ لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ثم لتسالن يومئذ عن النعيم

text_english: By the ˹passage of˺ time!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱلْعَصْرِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: والعصر

text_english: Surely humanity is in ˹grave˺ loss
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لَفِى خُسْرٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان الانسان لفي خسر

text_english: except those who have faith, do good, and urge each other to the truth, and urge each other to perseverance.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الا الذين امنوا وعملوا الصالحات وتواصوا بالحق وتواصوا بالصبر

text_english: Woe to every backbiter, slanderer
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَيْلٌ لِّكُلِّ هُمَزَةٍ لُّمَزَةٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ويل لكل همزة لمزة

text_english: who amasses wealth ˹greedily˺ and counts it ˹repeatedly˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِى جَمَعَ مَالًا وَعَدَّدَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذي جمع مالا وعدده

text_english: thinking that their wealth will make them immortal!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: يَحْسَبُ أَنَّ مَالَهُۥٓ أَخْلَدَهُۥ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: يحسب ان ماله اخلده

text_english: Not at all! Such a person will certainly be tossed into the Crusher.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: كَلَّا ۖ لَيُنۢبَذَنَّ فِى ٱلْحُطَمَةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: كلا لينبذن في الحطمة

text_english: And what will make you realize what the Crusher is?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحُطَمَةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وما ادراك ما الحطمة

text_english: ˹It is˺ Allah’s kindled Fire
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: نَارُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُوقَدَةُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: نار الله الموقدة

text_english: which rages over the hearts.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّتِى تَطَّلِعُ عَلَى ٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: التي تطلع على الافئدة

text_english: It will be sealed over them
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّهَا عَلَيْهِم مُّؤْصَدَةٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انها عليهم مؤصدة

text_english: ˹tightly secured˺ with long braces.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فِى عَمَدٍ مُّمَدَّدَةٍۭ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: في عمد ممددة

text_english: Have you not seen ˹O Prophet˺ how your Lord dealt with the Army of the Elephant?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْفِيلِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الم تر كيف فعل ربك باصحاب الفيل

text_english: Did He not frustrate their scheme?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَلَمْ يَجْعَلْ كَيْدَهُمْ فِى تَضْلِيلٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الم يجعل كيدهم في تضليل

text_english: For He sent against them flocks of birds
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَأَرْسَلَ عَلَيْهِمْ طَيْرًا أَبَابِيلَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وارسل عليهم طيرا ابابيل

text_english: that pelted them with stones of baked clay
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: تَرْمِيهِم بِحِجَارَةٍ مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ترميهم بحجارة من سجيل

text_english: leaving them like chewed up straw.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَجَعَلَهُمْ كَعَصْفٍ مَّأْكُولٍۭ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فجعلهم كعصف ماكول

text_english: ˹At least˺ for ˹the favour of˺ making Quraysh habitually secure—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لِإِيلَـٰفِ قُرَيْشٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لايلاف قريش

text_english: secure in their trading caravan ˹to Yemen˺ in the winter and ˹Syria˺ in the summer—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِۦلَـٰفِهِمْ رِحْلَةَ ٱلشِّتَآءِ وَٱلصَّيْفِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ايلافهم رحلة الشتاء والصيف

text_english: let them worship the Lord of this ˹Sacred˺ House
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَلْيَعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّ هَـٰذَا ٱلْبَيْتِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فليعبدوا رب هذا البيت

text_english: Who has fed them against hunger and made them secure against fear.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذي اطعمهم من جوع وامنهم من خوف

text_english: Have you seen the one who denies the ˹final˺ Judgment?
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يُكَذِّبُ بِٱلدِّينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ارايت الذي يكذب بالدين

text_english: That is the one who repulses the orphan
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَذَٰلِكَ ٱلَّذِى يَدُعُّ ٱلْيَتِيمَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فذلك الذي يدع اليتيم

text_english: and does not encourage the feeding of the poor.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولا يحض على طعام المسكين

text_english: So woe to those ˹hypocrites˺ who pray
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلْمُصَلِّينَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فويل للمصلين

text_english: yet are unmindful of their prayers;
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَن صَلَاتِهِمْ سَاهُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذين هم عن صلاتهم ساهون

text_english: those who ˹only˺ show off
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ يُرَآءُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذين هم يراءون

text_english: and refuse to give ˹even the simplest˺ aid.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَيَمْنَعُونَ ٱلْمَاعُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ويمنعون الماعون

text_english: Indeed, We have granted you ˹O Prophet˺ abundant goodness.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّآ أَعْطَيْنَـٰكَ ٱلْكَوْثَرَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: انا اعطيناك الكوثر

text_english: So pray and sacrifice to your Lord ˹alone˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَٱنْحَرْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فصل لربك وانحر

text_english: Only the one who hates you is truly cut off ˹from any goodness˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِنَّ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ ٱلْأَبْتَرُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ان شانئك هو الابتر

text_english: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “O you disbelievers!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: قُلْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: قل يا ايها الكافرون

text_english: I do not worship what you worship
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَآ أَعْبُدُ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لا اعبد ما تعبدون

text_english: nor do you worship what I worship.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَـٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولا انتم عابدون ما اعبد

text_english: I will never worship what you worship
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَآ أَنَا۠ عَابِدٌ مَّا عَبَدتُّمْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولا انا عابد ما عبدتم

text_english: nor will you ever worship what I worship.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَـٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولا انتم عابدون ما اعبد

text_english: You have your way, and I have my Way.”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَكُمْ دِينُكُمْ وَلِىَ دِينِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لكم دينكم ولي دين

text_english: When Allah’s ˹ultimate˺ help comes and the victory ˹over Mecca is achieved˺
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِذَا جَآءَ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلْفَتْحُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اذا جاء نصر الله والفتح

text_english: and you ˹O Prophet˺ see the people embracing Allah’s Way in crowds
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ورايت الناس يدخلون في دين الله افواجا

text_english: then glorify the praises of your Lord and seek His forgiveness, for certainly He is ever Accepting of Repentance.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: فسبح بحمد ربك واستغفره انه كان توابا

text_english: May the hands of Abu Lahab perish, and he ˹himself˺ perish!
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: تَبَّتْ يَدَآ أَبِى لَهَبٍ وَتَبَّ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: تبت يدا ابي لهب وتب

text_english: Neither his wealth nor ˹worldly˺ gains will benefit him.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ما اغنى عنه ماله وما كسب

text_english: He will burn in a flaming Fire
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: سَيَصْلَىٰ نَارًا ذَاتَ لَهَبٍ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: سيصلى نارا ذات لهب

text_english: and ˹so will˺ his wife, the carrier of ˹thorny˺ kindling
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ حَمَّالَةَ ٱلْحَطَبِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: وامراته حمالة الحطب

text_english: around her neck will be a rope of palm-fibre.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: فِى جِيدِهَا حَبْلٌ مِّن مَّسَدٍۭ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: في جيدها حبل من مسد

text_english: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “He is Allah—One ˹and Indivisible˺;
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: قُلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: قل هو الله احد

text_english: Allah—the Sustainer ˹needed by all˺.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱللَّهُ ٱلصَّمَدُ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الله الصمد

text_english: He has never had offspring, nor was He born.
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: لم يلد ولم يولد

text_english: And there is none comparable to Him.”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُۥ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌۢ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ولم يكن له كفوا احد

text_english: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “I seek refuge in the Lord of the daybreak
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْفَلَقِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: قل اعوذ برب الفلق

text_english: from the evil of whatever He has created
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: من شر ما خلق

text_english: and from the evil of the night when it grows dark
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ومن شر غاسق اذا وقب

text_english: and from the evil of those ˹witches casting spells by˺ blowing onto knots
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمِن شَرِّ ٱلنَّفَّـٰثَـٰتِ فِى ٱلْعُقَدِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ومن شر النفاثات في العقد

text_english: and from the evil of an envier when they envy.”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ومن شر حاسد اذا حسد

text_english: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “I seek refuge in the Lord of humankind
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلنَّاسِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: قل اعوذ برب الناس

text_english: the Master of humankind
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مَلِكِ ٱلنَّاسِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: ملك الناس

text_english: the God of humankind
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: إِلَـٰهِ ٱلنَّاسِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: اله الناس

text_english: from the evil of the lurking whisperer—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مِن شَرِّ ٱلْوَسْوَاسِ ٱلْخَنَّاسِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: من شر الوسواس الخناس

text_english: who whispers into the hearts of humankind—
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: ٱلَّذِى يُوَسْوِسُ فِى صُدُورِ ٱلنَّاسِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: الذي يوسوس في صدور الناس

text_english: from among jinn and humankind.”
text_arabic_with_tashkeel: مِنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ وَٱلنَّاسِ
text_arabic_without_tashkeel: من الجنة والناس
